channel.title: +श्रीवासः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +श्रीवासः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: लोकाचार्यानुगाकर्षणम्
item.description:
List of main issues with which vaDakalai people get misled (rest all are negotiable) -

  • performance of bharanyasa as a seperate kriyA.
    • Arguments like - there was no proof of prapatti performed seperately like how it is done today by acharyas post Ramanuja pre Desika - seemed like a post Desika innovation.
    • TW Such aitihyas seemed very convincing - easily available - seemed to dismiss upAyAnushTAna
  • position of v4s. tks act like equality on outside - but inside they are as casteist as vks
  • performance of nitya karmas. Getting reasons to skip nitya karma was convinient.

This must be done with proof, showing double standards of tks, our position etc..
